name: IRC_BC_REQ_SP_ASSGMNTS
description: Stores background check screening packages assigned to a requisition in recruiting.

columns.Name: REQ_SP_ASSGMNT_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for this table. System generated.

columns.Name: OBJECT_STATUS
columns.Comments: Stores the status of the object.

columns.Name: REQUISITION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_REQUISITIONS_B

columns.Name: PROVISIONING_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_TP_PARTNER_PROVISNGS

columns.Name: ACCOUNT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_TP_PARTNER_ACCOUNTS

columns.Name: PHASE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to  IRC_PHASES_B

columns.Name: STATE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to  IRC_STATES_B

columns.Name: ENTERING_PHASE_FLAG
columns.Comments: stores the flag whether to trigger a package when entering a corresponding phase

columns.Name: LEAVING_PHASE_FLAG
columns.Comments: stores the flag whether to trigger a package when leaving a corresponding phase

columns.Name: EVENT_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the event code as a lookup code. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_PROC_ACTION_EVENT.

columns.Name: SCR_PKG_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the code identifying the screening package assigned to requisition

columns.Name: SCR_PKG_NAME
columns.Comments: Stores the name of the screening package

columns.Name: SCR_SEQUENCE
columns.Comments: Stores the screening sequence

columns.Name: ADDED_BY
columns.Comments: Stores the user who added the screening package to the requisition

columns.Name: ADDED_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the date the screening package was added to requisition

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
